notes: R7 Phase C: LongMemEval-S subset (ref-mastra test-dataset.json). question_type=multi-session. compactionPoint at mid-point (2) so the answer location is predictable wrt recap vs tail. Published baseline (OMEGA 95.4%, Memoria ~89%, RetainDB 79%) uses the full 500-question set — this 3-item subset is sanity, not direct head-to-head.

turns.content: I'm thinking about getting a pet.
That's exciting! What kind of pet are you considering?
I got a golden retriever! His name is Max.
Congratulations on your new golden retriever! Max is a great name.

probes.question: What pet do I have?
probes.criterion: Response must include the answer 'A golden retriever named Max' (or a clear paraphrase). Empty or contradictory answers fail. This is a multi-session probe from LongMemEval-S.
